notes:
Neural narration starts fast now.

You measured it with the timing badge: the neural voice took ~18 SECONDS to start every play. The reason: your phone synthesizes the neural voice slower than real time, and the app was waiting for the WHOLE opening sentence before making a single sound.

Two fixes:
- It now plays the first few words almost immediately and streams the rest behind them, so audio starts in a few seconds instead of 18.
- The neural engine now uses more of your phone's CPU cores (was capped at 2), so all synthesis is faster.

(Stop is already instant as of 2.23.7.)

Check the timing badge again (Settings > Voice > Narration timing) and tell me the new "start" number — I'm expecting a big drop. If it's still not fast enough on your phone, the next lever is a lighter "Fast" neural voice built for slower devices.
